message.content:
Você está trabalhando no projeto Easy Salon em `C:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy\easy-salon-monorepo\frontend\src`.

**TAREFA:** Substituir classes Tailwind hardcoded por tokens do Design System nos arquivos listados abaixo. NÃO altere nada além do que está especificado.

## Regras de substituição

### Cat. A — Cores neutras (gray → DS)
- `text-gray-900`, `text-gray-800` → `text-foreground`
- `text-gray-600`, `text-gray-700` → `text-muted-foreground`
- `text-gray-500`, `text-gray-400` → `text-muted-foreground`
- `bg-gray-50`, `bg-gray-100` → `bg-muted`
- `bg-gray-200`, `bg-gray-300` → `bg-muted`
- `border-gray-200`, `border-gray-300` → `border-border`

### Cat. B — Validação (red → destructive)
- `border-red-500`, `border-red-600` em inputs de validação → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500`, `text-red-600` em mensagens de erro e asteriscos obrigatórios → `text-destructive`
- `focus-visible:ring-red-500` → `focus-visible:ring-destructive`
**MANTER** vermelho para: status de agendamento cancelado, badges de status de plano (past_due, unpaid), alertas de plano expirado, ações destrutivas (botão cancelar, ícone de lixeira)

### Cat. C — Info boxes azuis → secondary
- `bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 text-blue-700` → `bg-secondary border-border text-muted-foreground`
- `text-blue-700`, `text-blue-800` → `text-muted-foreground` (somente em info boxes informativos, não em status semânticos de agendamento)
- `bg-blue-50` → `bg-secondary` (somente em info boxes informativos)
- `border-blue-200` → `border-border` (somente em info boxes informativos)
**MANTER** azul para: tipos de ausência, status de agendamento "Atendendo", badge "trialing" de plano, link simples.

## Arquivos para editar

### pages/salon/settings/SalonDataPage.tsx (Cat. A)
Substitua:
- `text-gray-600` → `text-muted-foreground` (múltiplas ocorrências)
- `text-gray-400` → `text-muted-foreground` (múltiplas ocorrências)
- `text-gray-500` → `text-muted-foreground` (múltiplas ocorrências)
- `border-gray-300` → `border-border` (múltiplas ocorrências)

### components/forms/UserScheduleForm.tsx (Cat. A)
Linha 401: `!isSalonOpen && "opacity-40 bg-gray-100 text-gray-400"` → `!isSalonOpen && "opacity-40 bg-muted text-muted-foreground"`

### pages/admin/EditUserPage.tsx (Cat. A + C)
Cat. A: `text-gray-500` → `text-muted-foreground` (no loader de loading)
Cat. C: `bg-blue-50 ... text-blue-700` info boxes → `bg-secondary border-border text-muted-foreground`

### pages/admin/CreateSalonPage.tsx (Cat. A)
- `text-gray-600` → `text-muted-foreground`
- `text-gray-400` → `text-muted-foreground`

### pages/admin/CreateUserPage.tsx (Cat. A + B + C)
Cat. A: `text-gray-500` → `text-muted-foreground`
Cat. B: `text-red-500` em asteriscos e erros de validação → `text-destructive`, `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`, `text-red-600` em mensagens de erro → `text-destructive`
Cat. C: `bg-blue-50 ... text-blue-700` info box → `bg-secondary border-border text-muted-foreground`

### components/agenda/mobile/NewAppointmentBottomSheet.tsx (Cat. A + C)
Cat. A:
- `border-gray-200` → `border-border`
- `hover:border-gray-300` → `hover:border-border`
- `text-gray-900` → `text-foreground`
- `bg-gray-100 text-gray-400` → `bg-muted text-muted-foreground`
- `bg-gray-300` → `bg-muted`
- `bg-gray-50` → `bg-muted`
Cat. C: `bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200` info box → `bg-secondary rounded-xl p-4 border border-border`, `text-blue-900` → `text-foreground`

### pages/Register.tsx (Cat. B)
- `text-red-500` em asteriscos e mensagens de erro → `text-destructive`
- `border-red-500 focus-visible:ring-red-500` → `border-destructive focus-visible:ring-destructive`

### pages/SetPassword.tsx (Cat. B)
- `text-red-500` em asteriscos → `text-destructive`

### components/PasswordRequirements.tsx (Cat. B)
- `iconColor = "text-red-500"` (erro) → `iconColor = "text-destructive"`
- `iconColor = "text-green-600"` → MANTER (sucesso semântico)

### components/forms/ServiceForm.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`

### components/forms/SpecialtyForm.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`

### components/forms/AdminSpecialtyForm.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`

### components/modals/ClientModal.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`
- MANTER: `text-red-500 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50` no botão de deletar cliente (ação destrutiva)

### components/modals/ServiceConfigModal.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`

### components/agenda/ModalNovaAusencia.tsx (Cat. B)
- `border-red-500` → `border-destructive`
- `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`

### components/onboarding/StepServices.tsx (Cat. B)
- `text-red-500` em mensagens de validação → `text-destructive`

### components/onboarding/StepSchedule.tsx (Cat. B)
- `text-red-500` em mensagens de validação → `text-destructive`

### components/onboarding/StepProfessional.tsx (Cat. B)
- `text-red-500` em mensagens de validação → `text-destructive`

### pages/salon/UserSchedulePage.tsx (Cat. C)
- `bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200` info box → `bg-secondary border border-border`
- `text-blue-700` → `text-muted-foreground`

Leia cada arquivo antes de editar. Use o Edit tool para fazer as alterações. Ao terminar, retorne um resumo de quais arquivos foram alterados e quais mudanças foram feitas.

content.text:
The `text-red-500 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50` on the delete button in `ClientModal.tsx` is intentionally preserved (destructive action rule). All looks correct.

Here is a summary of all changes made:

---

**Files altered and changes made:**

**`pages/salon/settings/SalonDataPage.tsx`** (Cat. A)
- `text-xs text-gray-600` on URL hint → `text-muted-foreground`
- `text-gray-400` on Info tooltip icon → `text-muted-foreground`
- `text-sm text-gray-600` on color description paragraph → `text-muted-foreground`
- `border-gray-300` on color picker box → `border-border`
- `text-sm text-gray-600` on logo recommendations block → `text-muted-foreground`
- `border-dashed border-gray-300` on logo upload area → `border-border`
- `text-gray-400` on Upload icon → `text-muted-foreground`
- `text-sm text-gray-600` and `text-xs text-gray-500` on upload helper texts → `text-muted-foreground`
